$comment: Hand-authored fixture for docs/android-contracts/episode-tracking.md. Demonstrates the independence of watch/rating/review logs on a single episode (2 watches, 1 rating, 1 review, all separately timestamped) plus a pre-platform (dateless) watch event on a different episode. Not exported from a live database.

reviews.reviewText: Perfect pilot. Sets the tone immediately.

watchEvents.$comment: null watchedAt = watched before joining the platform; sorts as oldest in the timeline

seasonRollup.$comment: Denormalized counters on `seasons`, NOT derived automatically from watchEvents by the DB — client must compute and write these explicitly (see episode-tracking.md §3).
